items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis found a significant cross-education effect (force production gains in the contralateral non-trained limb) after unilateral resistance training in clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 单侧阻力训练的交叉教育效应在临床人群中表现出显著的益处，尤其是在肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者中。在无法进行双侧训练时，这是一个非常有价值的训练策略，现在你可以更有信心地将其纳入康复方案。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后临床人群力量产生能力的交叉教育效应：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，单侧阻力训练后临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者）的力量产生能力存在显著的交叉教育效应（对侧未训练肢体力量增强）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect of unilateral resistance training shows significant benefits in clinical populations, particularly for musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke. This is a highly valuable training strategy when bilateral training is not feasible, and you can now integrate it into rehabilitation protocols with greater confidence.
items.limitation: 元分析结果异质性高，训练参数（如收缩类型、强度）对效应量的具体贡献尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in meta-analysis results, and the specific contribution of training parameters (e.g., contraction type, intensity) to the effect size remains unclear.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: A critically appraised paper highlights that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as, and health status more than, center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 移动式肺康复与中心式肺康复在改善运动能力方面同样有效，在健康状况改善方面甚至更好。如果你的患者难以参加实体中心康复，移动式方案是可行的替代选择，你可以放心推荐。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动式肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心式肺康复同样有效，在健康状况方面甚至优于中心式肺康复（针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病）[评论]
items.summaryZh: 一篇批判性评估论文指出，移动式肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者的运动能力方面与中心式肺康复同样有效，在健康状况方面甚至更佳。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity, and even better in improving health status. If your patients struggle with in-person center rehabilitation, mobile options are viable alternatives you can confidently recommend.
items.limitation: 此为评论文章，需要查阅原文了解其系统综述的完整局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, and you need to refer to the original article for the full limitations of its systematic review.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that those receiving preoperative physiotherapy before primary total knee arthroplasty (TKA) had improved patient-reported outcomes (KOOS-PS) and pain at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively compared to those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 术前物理治疗是否能改善 TKA 术后预后仍无定论。这个大样本观察性研究虽然提示有益，但因其回顾性设计，存在难以控制的混杂因素，不能作为改变常规实践的依据。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的队列研究纳入 1,688 例患者，发现与未接受术前物理治疗的患者相比，接受初次全膝关节置换术前物理治疗的患者在术后 2 个月和 1 年的患者报告结局（KOOS-PS）和疼痛有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of preoperative physiotherapy on TKA outcomes remains unclear. While this large observational study suggests benefits, its retrospective design introduces confounding factors, preventing it from being a basis for changing routine practice.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未报告具体干预方案。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, potential for confounding factors, and specific intervention protocols were not reported.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 60 participants with upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome found that combined therapeutic massage and conventional physiotherapy showed superior short-term effects on pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life compared to either intervention alone.
items.curatedReason: 手法治疗和常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征短期效果均有，但联合治疗似乎更优。这个研究为临床实践中结合两者提供了初步证据。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 60 例上斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，治疗性按摩联合常规物理治疗在短期内对疼痛、压痛阈值、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量的改善优于单独使用任何一种干预措施。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both manual therapy and conventional physiotherapy show short-term benefits for myofascial pain syndrome, but combined treatment appears superior. This study provides preliminary evidence for integrating both approaches in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（n=60），仅评估了短期效果。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size (n=60) and only short-term effects were evaluated.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study exploring physiotherapists' perceptions of the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention found it acceptable, but successful implementation relies on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: 虽然这项定性研究显示 WalkBack 预防腰痛项目对物理治疗师有吸引力，但其成功推广依赖于全面的培训、临床实践的灵活性以及诊所层面的支持。在考虑引入新项目时，你需要提前规划这些要素。
items.titleZh: 用于预防腰痛的 WalkBack（步行与教育）项目对物理治疗师而言是可接受的，但其优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探讨物理治疗师对 WalkBack（步行与教育）腰痛预防项目看法的定性研究发现，该项目可接受，但其成功实施依赖于培训、实践灵活性和系统层面的促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this qualitative study indicates the WalkBack low back pain prevention program is appealing to physiotherapists, successful implementation hinges on comprehensive training, clinical flexibility, and system-level support. You need to plan for these elements when considering new program adoption.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，结果受访谈者主观感知影响。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, results influenced by subjective perceptions of interviewees.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1350 Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain identified socio-cultural factors as predictors of short- and long-term pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的预后有预测作用。在评估和制定治疗方案时，除了生物医学因素，你需要更全面地考虑患者的社会文化背景。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的预测性社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 1350 名荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者的非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素是非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者短期和长期疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量结局的预测因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Socio-cultural factors are predictive of outcomes in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. When assessing and developing treatment plans, you need to consider patients' socio-cultural backgrounds more comprehensively, beyond just biomedical factors.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，仅限于荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, limited to Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients, with limited generalizability of results.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' and patients' experiences with SupportPrim PT, an AI-powered clinical decision support system for musculoskeletal disorders, finding it influences decision-making processes.
items.curatedReason: 临床决策支持系统（CDSS）在肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的作用正在探索中。在评估这类人工智能辅助工具时，你需要关注它如何影响治疗师和患者的决策自主权，而不是单纯追求技术能力。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者体验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师和患者对 SupportPrim PT（一种人工智能驱动的肌肉骨骼疾病临床决策支持系统）的体验，发现它会影响决策过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: The role of Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) in musculoskeletal disorder management is evolving. When evaluating such AI-assisted tools, you need to focus on how they influence the decision-making autonomy of both therapists and patients, rather than solely on technical capabilities.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，受访者来自挪威单一地区。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, and interviewees were from a single region in Norway.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study comparing 23 individuals with stroke, 23 age-matched community-dwelling adults, and 12 young adults, found stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings, particularly in trunk rotation and supporting foot adjustment.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者在通过狭窄开口时的运动模式与健康人不同。在康复训练中，你需要针对性地关注躯干旋转和支撑足调整，这对于提高他们的功能性移动能力至关重要。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项比较 23 名卒中患者、23 名年龄匹配的社区老年人和 12 名年轻人的横断面研究发现，卒中患者在通过狭窄开口时存在特定运动模式，尤其是在躯干旋转和支撑足调整方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients exhibit different movement patterns than healthy individuals when navigating narrow openings. In rehabilitation training, you need to specifically focus on trunk rotation and support foot adjustments, which are crucial for improving their functional mobility.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，样本量较小，且无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study with a small sample size, unable to infer causality.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 18 studies on self-management interventions for neurological conditions, mapping behavior change theories, techniques (BCTs), and their effectiveness in improving functioning outcomes, primarily covering stroke, spinal cord injury, and multiple sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 神经系统疾病的自我管理干预正在增多，但目前行为改变理论和技术的多样性较高。在设计或推荐自我管理项目时，你需要了解哪些行为改变技术可能有效，并根据患者具体情况选择合适的策略。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容和影响的范围审查
items.summaryZh: 一项范围审查确定了 18 项针对神经系统疾病自我管理干预的研究，梳理了行为改变理论、技术（BCTs）及其在改善功能结局方面的有效性，主要涵盖卒中、脊髓损伤和多发性硬化症。
items.curatedReasonEn: Self-management interventions for neurological disorders are increasing, but there is high variability in behavior change theories and techniques. When designing or recommending self-management programs, you need to understand which behavior change techniques might be effective and select appropriate strategies based on the patient's specific situation.
items.limitation: 文献类型主要是综述，缺乏统一的行为改变理论和技术报告，难以得出确切有效性结论。
items.limitationEn: Mainly review type literature, lacking uniform reporting of behavior change theories and techniques, making it difficult to draw definitive conclusions on effectiveness.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study explored the experiences of 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease, highlighting practices and challenges in quality, content, and accessibility.
items.curatedReason: 线上帕金森病群体运动显示出可行性和依从性。你需要深入了解这些项目的交付经验，包括质量、内容和可及性挑战，以便更好地为患者提供线上康复服务。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的线上群体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性访谈研究探讨了 10 名康复和健身专业人员为帕金森病患者提供线上群体运动的经验，强调了在质量、内容和可及性方面的实践和挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise for Parkinson's disease shows feasibility and adherence. You need to understand the delivery experiences, including challenges in quality, content, and accessibility, to better provide online rehabilitation services to patients.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，仅代表提供者的经验，未直接评估患者体验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, representing only provider experiences, and not directly assessing patient experiences.

items.title: Preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak
items.summary: The Slava Topol Project (STP) launched a feasibility study for a preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak, a 7000 m mountain, aiming to improve safety for climbers following a guide's death in 2022.
items.curatedReason: 列宁峰的预防性搜救服务项目突出了高海拔环境下安全保障的重要性。虽然这与临床实践有距离，但它提醒我们在任何专业场景中，风险评估和预防措施都不可或缺。
items.titleZh: 列宁峰上的预防性搜救服务
items.summaryZh: 为提高列宁峰（一座海拔 7000 米的山峰）登山者的安全性，Slava Topol 项目（STP）启动了一项预防性搜救服务可行性研究，此前在 2022 年曾有一名向导遇难。
items.curatedReasonEn: The preventative search and rescue service project on Lenin Peak highlights the importance of safety in high-altitude environments. While this is somewhat distant from clinical practice, it serves as a reminder that risk assessment and preventative measures are essential in any professional setting.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This observational study found that digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold (PPT) assessment in 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis demonstrated excellent relative reliability (ICC values typically >0.75) and acceptable measurement error, suggesting its potential for clinical use.
items.curatedReason: 数字测压计用于终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压痛阈测量，显示出良好的信度和可接受的测量误差，在临床评估中可作为有效工具。
items.titleZh: 数字测压计测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压痛阈的信度研究：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究发现，在 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者中，基于数字测压计的压痛阈（PPT）评估表现出优异的相对信度（ICC 值通常 >0.75）和可接受的测量误差，提示其在临床应用中的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometry for pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients shows good reliability and acceptable measurement error, suggesting its utility in clinical assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so external generalizability should be considered.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: This observational cohort study of 317 severely injured trauma patients in Norway found that only 10% received assessment by a physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist within 72 hours, with early assessment occurring in 43% of patients with spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心对重伤患者的早期康复评估率较低，提示我们需要审视和改进创伤患者的物理医学与康复专家早期介入流程。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：一项来自两个挪威创伤中心的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项对挪威 317 名重度创伤患者的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的患者在 72 小时内接受了物理医学与康复专家的评估，其中脊髓损伤患者的早期评估率为 43%。
items.curatedReasonEn: The low rate of early rehabilitation assessment for severely injured trauma patients in Norwegian trauma centers indicates a need to review and improve the early involvement process for physical medicine and rehabilitation specialists in trauma care.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据来自挪威，结果外推至其他国家需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study, so it cannot establish causality. The data is from Norway, so generalizability to other countries should be considered.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This observational study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals who had undergone ACL reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, finding lower EMG activity in ACLR patients.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的比目鱼肌电活动，提示康复方案可能需要更多关注小腿三头肌的神经肌肉控制训练。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中跟腱三头肌的神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体和健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中跟腱三头肌的肌电（EMG）活动，发现 ACLR 患者的 EMG 活动较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACLR patients exhibit lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, suggesting rehabilitation protocols may need to focus more on neuromuscular control training for the triceps surae.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法提供纵向变化或因果关系，样本量未提及。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional design, so it cannot provide longitudinal changes or causality, and the sample size was not mentioned.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: This qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients found that mindset, effort, and support were key determinants in their decision to return to sport (RTS), condensing 271 meaning units into three categories: "motivation and driving forces," "treatment and recovery," and "medical clearance and readiness."
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策受心态、努力和支持的驱动，这提醒你在制定康复计划时，除了生理功能，更要重视患者的心理和社会支持因素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项对 112 名 ACL 损伤患者的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是他们重返运动（RTS）决策的关键决定因素，将 271 个意义单元浓缩为“动机和驱动力”、“治疗和恢复”以及“医疗许可和准备”三个类别。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients' decisions to return to sport after ACL injury are driven by mindset, effort, and support. This highlights the importance of addressing psychological and social support factors in rehabilitation planning, beyond just physiological function.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，无法量化各因素的重要性或建立因果关系，且基于患者自述。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, so it cannot quantify the importance of factors or establish causality, and it is based on patient self-reports.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey described how physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) is influenced by patient clinical presentation.
items.curatedReason: 针对儿童和青少年 ACLR 患者的血流限制训练，其临床决策受到患者表现的多种因素影响。作为物理治疗师，你需要更清晰地理解如何在临床实践中根据个体情况安全有效地应用 BFRT。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查描述了物理治疗师在儿童和青少年前交叉韧带重建术后患者中应用血流限制训练（BFRT）的临床决策如何受到患者临床表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent ACLR patients is influenced by various patient presentation factors. As a physical therapist, you need a clearer understanding of how to safely and effectively apply BFRT based on individual patient circumstances in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，无法反映因果关系或 BFRT 应用的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, so it cannot reflect causality or the actual effects of BFRT application.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松患者上肢脆性骨折后，跌倒风险和对跌倒的恐惧显著影响其生活和康复。你在制定康复计划时，应将这些心理社会因素纳入考量，而不仅仅关注骨折愈合。
items.titleZh: 老年骨质疏松伴近期上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法及需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了老年骨质疏松伴上肢骨折患者的视角，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒和跌倒恐惧（FoF）对日常生活的影响，以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Fall risk and fear of falling significantly impact the lives and rehabilitation of older adults with osteoporosis after an upper extremity fragility fracture. When developing rehabilitation plans, you should consider these psychosocial factors, not just fracture healing.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小且患者集中于上肢骨折，结果不一定能推广到其他类型骨折。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size and focuses on upper extremity fractures, so the results may not be generalizable to other fracture types.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: This single-blind randomized controlled trial involving 28 participants with chronic ankle instability found that both Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) immediately improved dynamic balance and proprioception, with ST showing superior effects on ankle joint position sense error.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）均能立即改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉，但在踝关节位置觉方面，ST 效果更优。在临床应用时，你需要根据具体康复目标选择不同贴扎策略。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳患者的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）均能立即改善动态平衡和本体感觉，其中 ST 在踝关节位置觉误差方面表现出更优的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Both dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) immediately improve dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability, but ST is superior for ankle joint position sense. When applying in clinic, you need to choose different taping strategies based on specific rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（n=28），且仅评估了即时效应，缺乏长期随访结果。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (n=28) and only evaluated immediate effects, lacking long-term follow-up results.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial involving 33 individuals with chronic stroke found that Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training significantly improved ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion, static balance, and fall efficacy compared to Mulligan taping with treadmill training or treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: Kinesio 贴扎联合跑步机训练，在改善慢性卒中患者踝关节背屈活动度、静态平衡和跌倒效能方面，优于单独跑步机训练和 Mulligan 贴扎。这提示你在卒中康复中，贴扎类型选择可能影响治疗效果。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 33 名慢性卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎联合跑步机训练在改善踝关节背屈被动活动度、静态平衡和跌倒效能方面，显著优于 Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练或单独跑步机训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training is superior to treadmill training alone and Mulligan taping in improving ankle dorsiflexion range of motion, static balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients. This suggests that the choice of taping type may influence treatment outcomes in stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（n=33），且随访期仅 6 周，结果的长期有效性有待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (n=33) and a follow-up period of only 6 weeks, so the long-term effectiveness of the results requires further investigation.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy (MT Group) for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain (RCRSP) was feasible in 68 participants and explored preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes, suggesting potential benefits.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步 RCT 显示，在肩袖相关肩痛的物理治疗中，联合手法治疗是可行的，并提示其可能带来额外的患者报告结局改善，支持开展更大规模的非劣效性研究。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗联合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的疗效：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项初步随机临床试验发现，对 68 名肩袖相关肩痛（RCRSP）患者进行手法治疗联合务实物理治疗（MT 组）是可行的，并探讨了对患者报告结局的初步治疗效果，提示其潜在益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that combining manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and may offer additional improvements in patient-reported outcomes, supporting a larger non-inferiority trial.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步随机对照试验，样本量相对较小，结果仅为初步效应，需大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a relatively small sample size; the results are preliminary and require validation in larger studies.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of UK physiotherapists revealed a high perceived relevance and willingness to adapt the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in paediatric musculoskeletal services among 55 clinicians.
items.curatedReason: MSK-HQ（肌肉骨骼健康问卷）在成人中应用广泛，此研究显示儿科物理治疗师对将其改编用于儿科肌肉骨骼疾病的意愿较高。关注儿童结局测量的同行可留意其后续发展。
items.titleZh: 改编 MSK-HQ 用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.curatedReasonEn: The MSK-HQ (Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire) is widely used in adults, and this study indicates high interest among pediatric physiotherapists in adapting it for pediatric musculoskeletal conditions. Clinicians focused on pediatric outcome measures should monitor its future development.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且为探索性研究，未进行实际的问卷验证。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size and is exploratory, without actual questionnaire validation.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current evidence on ChatGPT's use within musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on how the technology has been studied across clinical tasks, study designs, comparators, and outcome domains.
items.curatedReason: 该综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用证据，虽然未评估有效性，但有助于了解当前技术研究方向。如果你正在探索 AI 工具在临床中的潜力，可关注此类综述。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的应用：范围综述
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps existing evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, offering insight into current research directions without evaluating effectiveness. Clinicians exploring AI tools in practice may find this review relevant.
items.limitation: 该综述仅限于描绘当前证据，未进行研究质量评估或有效性分析。
items.limitationEn: This review only maps current evidence and does not assess study quality or effectiveness.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: The Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM) was successfully cross-culturally adapted into Mexican Spanish (PRISM-MX) and showed preliminary internal consistency and convergent validity in 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX（卒中痉挛患者报告影响量表）的墨西哥西班牙语版本已完成跨文化改编和初步验证。如果你在墨西哥或服务于墨西哥裔人群，评估卒中后痉挛时可关注此工具。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 用于卒中后痉挛：墨西哥样本的跨文化改编和初步心理测量学评估
items.curatedReasonEn: The Mexican Spanish version of the Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM-MX) has undergone cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary validation. Clinicians in Mexico or those serving Mexican populations may consider this tool for assessing post-stroke spasticity.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（30 例），仅提供了初步的心理测量学证据。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (30 participants) and provides only preliminary psychometric evidence.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: A B-A-B single-case study with inpatients post-stroke found that rhythmic contralateral resistance handgrip exercises for 5 minutes daily reduced hand edema, with sustained effects observed.
items.curatedReason: 这项单病例研究提示健侧手握力训练可能对卒中患侧手水肿有即时和持续的缓解效果。虽然证据等级不高，但作为一种简单的辅助干预，可在临床中考虑小范围尝试。
items.titleZh: 健侧手握力训练对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效应
items.curatedReasonEn: This single-case study suggests that contralateral handgrip exercise may have immediate and sustained effects on hand edema in stroke patients. Although the evidence level is not high, it could be considered for small-scale trials as a simple adjunctive intervention in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例设计，样本量小，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-case design study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review of 5 databases identified and described the intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation from 2012-2026, summarizing characteristics, components, and outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述描绘了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成部分和结局测量。它为跨不同护理环境的卒中患者协调护理提供了概览。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预及结局测量：一项范围综述
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review describes the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation. It provides an overview of coordinated care for stroke survivors across various settings.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，它主要描述了现有研究，但没有对干预效果进行批判性评价。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily describes existing research but does not critically appraise the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence, with factors like caregiver education influencing access.
items.curatedReason: 在喀麦隆进行的这项研究揭示了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。它强调了提升低资源环境中服务可及性的重要性，对面临类似挑战的地区有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性和依从性：一项医院研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy. It underscores the importance of improving service accessibility in low-resource settings, offering insights for regions facing similar challenges.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心横断面研究，可能存在选择偏倚，且发现仅限于喀麦隆的特定背景。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, cross-sectional study, which may have selection bias, and its findings are specific to the Cameroonian context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions with 12 clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, identifying patterns in their communication strategies.
items.curatedReason: 本观察性研究探讨了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中使用注意力焦点指令和反馈的方式。它提示在远程医疗中，关注儿童的注意力焦点策略对运动学习效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点指令和反馈的应用：一项观察性研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study explores how pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention instructions and feedback in telehealth. It suggests that focusing on children's attention strategies is crucial for motor learning outcomes in telehealth.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（6 位治疗师，12 位患者），且为探索性观察设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 clients) and an exploratory observational design, precluding causal conclusions.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, showing agreement with video truth data for mobility metrics like stride length, number of steps, and activity time.
items.curatedReason: 名为 PREEMPT 的活动监测器在住院患者中进行了验证，显示出测量步长、步数和活动时间等的准确性。如果你在老年或急性护理中需要客观测量患者活动，可关注此工具。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测器：患者/居民活动追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor has been validated in hospitalized patients, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, number of steps, and activity time. Clinicians needing objective activity measurement in geriatric or acute care may find this tool useful.
items.limitation: 验证研究的样本量相对较小（10 名健康老年人，46 名住院患者），且仅限于急性护理环境。
items.limitationEn: The validation study has a relatively small sample size (10 healthy older adults, 46 hospitalized patients) and is limited to acute care settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy session for improving health-related quality of life in adult cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议，但在安全性方面是可靠的。这意味着远程康复提供更多便利，但不应夸大其额外疗效。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复安全，但改善生活质量不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life, but is safe. This means telerehabilitation offers convenience without necessarily providing additional efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究未详细披露远程组的具体依从性数据，且生活质量可能受多种因素影响，单一干预难以完全捕捉。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail specific adherence data for the telerehabilitation group, and quality of life, influenced by various factors, may not be fully captured by a single intervention.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the effective facilitation of exercise therapy for multidirectional shoulder instability in a 12-year-old female karate athlete through the use of figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 一个针对学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的病例报告，结合八字贴扎和康复训练取得了积极效果。八字贴扎可能为不稳严重的患者在康复早期提供辅助支持。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：病例报告
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report shows positive outcomes in a school-aged karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability using figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation. The taping may offer adjunctive support for patients with severe instability in early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，结论的外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: An update (3.0) to the clinical practice guideline in Germany on the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction has been published.
items.curatedReason: 这份德国临床实践指南更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的管理与实施，提供了最新的证据和操作规范。作为临床物理治疗师，特别是在神经康复领域，这份指南是你在处理相关患者时必须参考的最新标准，确保实践与国际前沿同步。
items.titleZh: 神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的管理与实施：德国临床实践指南更新3.0
items.summaryZh: 德国发布了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施的临床实践指南更新3.0版本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This updated German clinical practice guideline on the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization for neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction provides the latest evidence and operational standards. As a clinical physical therapist, especially in neurorehabilitation, this guideline is an essential reference for managing relevant patients, ensuring your practice is aligned with international best practices.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: An international team of researchers has restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models using a combined fusogenic therapy and comprehensive rehabilitation protocol.
items.curatedReason: 融合疗法结合全面康复在动物模型中恢复了完全脊髓横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。虽然是动物研究，但这种突破性进展为你提示了脊髓损伤康复未来可能的方向，可以密切关注其向人体试验转化的进展。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法结合康复在完全脊髓横断后恢复脊髓功能
items.summaryZh: 一个国际研究团队通过结合融合疗法和全面康复方案，在动物模型中恢复了完全脊髓横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: Fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models. Although an animal study, this breakthrough suggests a potential future direction for spinal cord injury rehabilitation, and you should closely monitor its progress toward human trials.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于动物模型，临床转化仍需时间。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to animal models, and clinical translation will still take time.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus | British Journal of Sports Medicine
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis on prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female athletes contributes to the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury Prevention (FAIR) consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和Meta分析为女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素提供了高证据等级的总结。你在指导女性运动员进行损伤预防和表现提升时，应将这些发现整合到你的评估和干预方案中，特别关注性别特异性的风险因素。
items.titleZh: 上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素：女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素的系统综述和Meta分析，为女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides a high-level evidence summary of prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. When guiding female athletes in injury prevention and performance enhancement, you should integrate these findings into your assessment and intervention protocols, paying particular attention to sex-specific risk factors.
items.limitation: 鉴于“早期发表”状态，仍需查阅全文以评估可能的局限性，如研究间的异质性或报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Given its "early publication" status, the full text should still be consulted to assess potential limitations, such as heterogeneity between studies or reporting bias.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (BONEMORE) investigated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women. Both interventions showed effects on physical function.
items.curatedReason: OsteoStrong和动态多组分运动对老年女性的身体功能均有积极影响。但如果原文有明确数据，要看干预的实际效应量，以决定是否值得作为首选推荐。在老年女性骨质疏松干预中，你需要关注这些新型手段的长期疗效和具体适用人群。
items.titleZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验：OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能影响的比较
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验探讨了 OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能的影响，结果显示两种干预措施均对身体功能有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: OsteoStrong and dynamic multicomponent exercise both positively influence physical function in older women. However, if the original text provides specific data, you need to assess the actual effect sizes of these interventions to determine if they warrant first-line recommendation. For osteoporosis interventions in older women, you should focus on the long-term efficacy and specific populations for whom these novel methods are applicable.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和外推性有待结合具体效应量进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: The clinical significance and generalizability of the findings require further evaluation in conjunction with specific effect sizes.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: This study evaluated longitudinal trends in functional status after ventral hernia repair, analyzing prospective data from a pilot trial (NCT05142618) between April 2022 and August 2024. It found that functional status improves after repair but has limits.
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但改善幅度存在限制。这提示你在患者术后康复中，应管理好患者预期，并根据TUG和5×STS测试结果，评估患者个体功能恢复的潜力与平台期，适时调整康复目标。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善极限
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态的纵向趋势，发现在术后功能会有改善，但改善幅度存在限制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limits to improvement. This suggests that in post-operative rehabilitation, you should manage patient expectations and, based on TUG and 5×STS test results, assess individual functional recovery potential and plateaus, adjusting rehabilitation goals accordingly.
items.limitation: 研究是试点试验的子分析，样本量可能不足以推断普遍性结论。
items.limitationEn: The study is a sub-analysis of a pilot trial, and the sample size may be insufficient to draw generalizable conclusions.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: A comparative Bayesian network analysis investigated directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用贝叶斯网络分析比较了多发性硬化症（MS）和帕金森病（PD）的症状依赖关系。了解这些疾病中症状如何相互影响，将帮助你更全面地评估患者，制定更具针对性的康复策略，尤其是那些看似不直接相关的共病症状。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症与帕金森病症状定向依赖关系：比较贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较贝叶斯网络分析研究了多发性硬化症和帕金森病中的症状定向依赖关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses Bayesian network analysis to compare symptom dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis (MS) and Parkinson's Disease (PD). Understanding how symptoms interact in these diseases will help you assess patients more comprehensively and develop more targeted rehabilitation strategies, especially for seemingly unrelated comorbidities.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络分析结果的因果推断需要进一步的临床验证。
items.limitationEn: Causal inferences from Bayesian network analysis results require further clinical validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A scoping review analyzed the exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述对运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复运动内容和报告方式进行了分析。它为你总结了现有文献中关于运动处方的关键信息，有助于你在制定个性化康复计划时，参考最佳实践，优化运动选择和干预顺序。
items.titleZh: 运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述分析了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review analyzed the exercise content and reporting methods for rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. It summarizes key information on exercise prescriptions from existing literature, helping you refer to best practices and optimize exercise selection and intervention sequencing when developing personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了它主要关注文献的广度而非深度，可能未对证据质量进行严格分级。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it primarily focuses on the breadth rather than depth of literature, and may not have strictly graded the quality of evidence.

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing ...
items.summary: A viewpoint article discusses how clinicians might approach assessing and managing perplexing pubic-related groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这份观点文章深入探讨了如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。它提供了专家对“棘手”病症的临床思路，你可以在评估和治疗这类复杂腹股沟疼痛时，参考其框架，优化你的诊断流程和干预选择，尤其是在鉴别诊断方面。
items.titleZh: 令人困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 一篇观点文章讨论了临床医生应如何评估和管理运动员中令人困惑的耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This viewpoint article delves into how to assess and manage pubic-related groin pain in athletes. It provides expert clinical insights into a "perplexing" condition, and you can refer to its framework when assessing and treating such complex groin pain to optimize your diagnostic process and intervention choices, especially regarding differential diagnosis.

items.title: Effect of 12-week dynamic stretching of hamstrings on joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 12-week dynamic stretching program for hamstrings improved joint flexibility, muscle strength, and musculoskeletal properties in the stretched limb, with the non-stretched limb assessed for comparison.
items.curatedReason: 12周动态蕕绳肌拉伸能有效改善关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和肌肉骨骼特性。在为患者制定针对性拉伸方案时，可以参考这类研究提供的长期干预效果，将其作为改善蕕绳肌功能的有效手段。
items.titleZh: 12周动态蕕绳肌拉伸对关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究旨在评估为期12周的动态蕕绳肌拉伸计划对关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和拉伸肢体肌肉骨骼特性的影响，结果显示动态拉伸能有效改善这些指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week dynamic hamstring stretching program effectively improves joint flexibility, muscle strength, and musculoskeletal properties. When designing targeted stretching programs for patients, you can refer to the long-term intervention effects provided by such research, considering it an effective means to improve hamstring function.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和效应量。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and effect size details.

items.title: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone for the treatment of vulvovaginal atrophy: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis assessed the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women, finding it effective for symptomatic relief.
items.curatedReason: 腔内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）对绝经后妇女阴道萎缩的治疗有效，尤其适用于对现有疗法反应不佳或有禁忌的患者。你在临床实践中评估盆底功能障碍时，应将此作为非手术干预的一个选项进行考虑，与患者讨论其潜在益处和风险。
items.titleZh: 腔内脱氢表雄酮治疗外阴阴道萎缩的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析评估了腔内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗绝经后妇女外阴阴道萎缩的疗效，发现其能有效缓解症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) is effective for treating vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women, especially those who do not respond well to or have contraindications for existing therapies. When evaluating pelvic floor dysfunction in clinical practice, you should consider this as a non-surgical intervention option, discussing its potential benefits and risks with patients.
items.limitation: 系统综述纳入的研究可能存在异质性，对总体效应量的解读需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review may include heterogeneous studies, requiring caution in interpreting overall effect sizes.

items.title: Histological study to assess CO2 laser therapy for the treatment of vaginal atrophy - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A histological study assessed CO2 laser therapy for vaginal atrophy, finding an association with improved VVA symptoms but no significant histological changes.
items.curatedReason: CO2激光疗法在改善阴道萎缩症状方面显示出关联，但在组织学上未见显著改变。这意味着其作用机制可能更多是症状性而非结构性。在向患者推荐此疗法时，你需要明确告知患者对其生物学效应的现有理解，并强调症状改善是主要目标。
items.titleZh: 组织学研究评估CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的效果
items.summaryZh: 一项组织学研究评估了CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的效果，发现该疗法与阴道萎缩症状改善相关，但未引起显著的组织学变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: CO2 laser therapy shows an association with improved vulvovaginal atrophy (VVA) symptoms, but without significant histological changes. This suggests its mechanism of action may be more symptomatic than structural. When recommending this therapy, you should clearly inform patients about the current understanding of its biological effects and emphasize that symptom improvement is the primary goal.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明激光参数和治疗方案。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide detailed laser parameters and treatment protocols.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: ChainBMD is a new deep learning framework that uses kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis for stroke evaluation and guidance, published in Expert Systems with Applications.
items.curatedReason: ChainBMD是一个利用动力链图和时间分析的深度学习框架，用于卒中评估和指导。你需要关注这类AI技术如何集成到临床实践中，以实现更精准、个性化的卒中康复评估和训练指导。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于动力链图和时间分析的深度学习卒中评估与指导框架
items.summaryZh: ChainBMD是一个新的深度学习框架，它利用动力链图和时间分析进行卒中评估和指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis for stroke evaluation and guidance. You need to pay attention to how such AI technologies can be integrated into clinical practice to achieve more precise and personalized stroke rehabilitation assessment and training guidance.
items.limitation: 作为深度学习框架的介绍，尚未提供临床验证的RCT结果。
items.limitationEn: As an introduction to a deep learning framework, no RCT results for clinical validation have been provided yet.

items.title: Stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD): technical insights and long-term outcomes | The Egyptian Journal of Neurology, Psychiatry and Neurosurgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A research article provides technical insights and long-term outcomes of stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD), focusing on motor symptom improvement.
items.curatedReason: 立体定向消融术是帕金森病（PD）的一种治疗选择，尤其关注其技术细节和长期预后。作为物理治疗师，你需要了解这类神经外科干预的效果，以便在术后康复计划中更精准地设定目标，并向患者解释术后功能改善的潜力与限制。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者立体定向消融术：技术洞察与长期预后
items.summaryZh: 一篇研究文章探讨了帕金森病患者立体定向消融术的技术细节和长期预后，重点关注运动症状的改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stereotactic ablation is a treatment option for Parkinson's disease (PD), with a focus on its technical insights and long-term outcomes. As a physical therapist, you need to understand the effects of such neurosurgical interventions to set more precise goals in postoperative rehabilitation plans and explain the potential and limitations of postoperative functional improvement to patients.
items.limitation: 研究的开放获取性质可能意味着对方法学细节的披露不够严格。
items.limitationEn: The open-access nature of the study may imply less stringent disclosure of methodological details.

items.title: The IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with the electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke | Chinese Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study found that IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 电针通过调节星形胶质细胞活性中的IL-17A来改善卒中后的感觉运动能力。这项发现为你提供了电针干预卒中康复的潜在生物学机制，深化了对传统疗法作用原理的理解。在应用电针辅助治疗时，可将此作为其作用的分子依据。
items.titleZh: IL-17A调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，IL-17A调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Electroacupuncture improves sensorimotor ability after stroke by modulating IL-17A in astrocytic activity. This finding provides you with the potential biological mechanism of electroacupuncture intervention in stroke rehabilitation, deepening the understanding of the working principles of traditional therapies. When applying electroacupuncture as an adjunct therapy, this can serve as a molecular basis for its effects.
items.limitation: 研究的动物模型结果不能直接外推至人体。
items.limitationEn: Results from animal models cannot be directly extrapolated to humans.

items.title: A preliminary analysis of the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease: associations with motor severity and subtypes | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A preliminary analysis characterized the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) inflammatory protein landscape in mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease, finding associations with motor severity and subtypes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步分析探讨了中晚期帕金森病脑脊液（CSF）中炎症蛋白与运动严重程度和亚型的关联。虽然是初步结果，但它为你提供了关于帕金森病神经炎症机制的最新信息，有助于你理解疾病进展，并在康复中考虑炎症对运动功能的影响。
items.titleZh: 中晚期帕金森病脑脊液炎症蛋白图谱初步分析：与运动严重程度和亚型的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项初步分析研究了中晚期帕金森病患者脑脊液（CSF）中炎症蛋白的分布，并发现其与运动严重程度和亚型存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary analysis investigates the association of inflammatory proteins in the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) with motor severity and subtypes in mid- to late-stage Parkinson's disease. While preliminary, it provides you with the latest information on neuroinflammatory mechanisms in PD, helping you understand disease progression and consider the impact of inflammation on motor function during rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步分析，样本量可能较小，需更大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary analysis, and the sample size may be small, requiring validation by larger studies.

items.title: Bouldering-related trauma: Injury patterns and operative burden over 10 years at a UK major trauma centre - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A 10-year review at a UK major trauma center analyzed bouldering-related trauma, detailing injury patterns and operative burden.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自英国主要创伤中心的10年回顾，揭示了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。你需要了解这类运动损伤的典型特征和高发部位，以便在接诊抱石爱好者时，能更精准地评估和管理其潜在或已发生的损伤。
items.titleZh: 抱石运动相关创伤：英国主要创伤中心十年来的损伤模式与手术负担
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国主要创伤中心进行的为期10年的研究，分析了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year review from a major UK trauma center reveals trauma patterns and operative burden related to bouldering. You need to understand the typical characteristics and common sites of such sports injuries so that you can more accurately assess and manage potential or existing injuries when treating bouldering enthusiasts.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在数据收集偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study, potential for data collection bias.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) provides additional benefits for muscle strength compared to conventional low-load (LLE) or high-load exercise (HLE) in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析表明，在肌肉骨骼康复中，低负荷伴血流限制（LLE-BFR）训练在增加肌肉力量方面，与常规低负荷（LLE）或高负荷（HLE）训练相比，显示出额外的益处。对于临床实践，这意味着在特定患者群体中，可以考虑将 LLE-BFR 作为一种有效的增强力量的方法，尤其是在低负荷训练无法达到预期效果时。
items.titleZh: 血流限制运动与常规运动在肌肉骨骼康复中的额外益处：系统综述与荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验（RCTs）进行的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与常规低负荷（LLE）或高负荷（HLE）运动相比，血流限制低负荷运动（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌肉力量方面具有额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis suggests that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits for muscle strength compared to conventional low-load (LLE) or high-load (HLE) exercise in musculoskeletal rehabilitation. Clinicians can consider LLE-BFR as an effective method to enhance strength in specific patient populations, particularly when low-load training alone is insufficient.
items.limitation: The review's conclusions are based on available RCTs, and the optimal parameters and specific patient subgroups for LLE-BFR may require further investigation.
items.limitationEn: The review's conclusions are based on available RCTs, and the optimal parameters and specific patient subgroups for LLE-BFR may require further investigation.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A prospective RCT in Switzerland evaluated diagnostic and treatment agreement between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department, assessing the feasibility of advanced physiotherapy practice roles.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性随机对照研究评估了瑞士急诊科物理治疗师（APP）在诊断和治疗肌肉骨骼疾病方面与住院医师和资深医师的一致性。研究结果将为物理治疗师在高级实践角色中的应用提供重要依据，尤其是在处理非紧急肌肉骨骼病症方面，可能优化患者流程和资源分配。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍的一线诊断与治疗一致性：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.titleEn: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summaryZh: 一项在瑞士进行的随机对照试验评估了物理治疗师与住院医师在急诊科肌肉骨骼病症诊断和治疗方面与资深医师的一致性，旨在为高级物理治疗实践角色提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective randomized controlled study evaluates the diagnostic and treatment agreement of physiotherapists in advanced practice roles (APP) compared to resident and senior physicians in a Swiss emergency department for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. The findings will be crucial for establishing the utility of APP roles in managing non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions, potentially optimizing patient flow and resource allocation.
items.limitation: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single center, and the generalizability of findings to other healthcare settings may be limited. The reference standard was senior physicians, and future studies could compare directly against a wider range of specialists.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy practice, research, and quality assessment, covering functioning and other domains.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究致力于为儿科物理治疗开发一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs）集。通过多方（青少年、家长、治疗师）参与和专家评估，选定了 9 项 PROs，涵盖功能（身体功能等）领域。这有助于规范儿科 PT 实践中的结局评估，提升研究和质量评估的一致性。
items.titleZh: 制定儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集
items.titleEn: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summaryZh: 一项研究为儿科物理治疗制定了一套核心的患者报告结局（PROs）和测量（PROMs），共包含 9 项，涵盖功能等领域，以规范日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. Through multi-stakeholder input and expert review, nine PROs were selected, covering domains like functioning. This initiative will help standardize outcome assessment in pediatric PT practice, enhancing consistency in research and quality evaluation.
items.limitation: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.limitationEn: The selection process involved surveys and expert panels, which may introduce biases. The applicability and validation of the selected PROMs across diverse pediatric populations require further study.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that a targeted strengthening program (STRENGTH) led by physiotherapists was superior to a standardized stretching program (STRETCH) for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) regarding hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived global change at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估了物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）治疗的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）组在 6 个月时，其髋部相关生活质量（QOL）和患者感知变化总评分（GROC）均优于标准化牵伸（STRETCH）组。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在 FAI 治疗中优先采用强化训练方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗效果：一项评估者设盲、有限披露的随机对照试验（PhysioFIRST 研究）
items.titleEn: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，物理治疗师主导的目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）方案，在 6 个月时，相比标准化牵伸（STRETCH）方案，在股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的髋部相关生活质量和患者感知变化方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluating physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) found that the targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) group showed superior hip-related quality of life (QOL) and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change (GROC) at 6 months compared to the standardized stretching (STRETCH) group. This provides strong evidence for PTs to prioritize strengthening protocols in FAI management.
items.limitation: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.
items.limitationEn: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis identified the most effective physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, suggesting a combination of manual therapy, exercise, and education as optimal.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）旨在比较不同物理治疗干预措施对成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）的疗效。结果确定了最有效的干预措施组合（例如，结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育），为 PT 提供了优化肩袖肌腱病治疗方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较有效性：系统综述与网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）确定了成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）最有效的物理治疗干预组合，建议结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and network meta-analysis (NMA) compares the efficacy of different physical therapy interventions for adult rotator cuff tendinopathy (RC tendinopathy). It identifies the most effective combination of interventions (e.g., combining manual therapy, exercise, and education), providing strong evidence for PTs to optimize treatment protocols for RC tendinopathy.
items.limitation: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT found that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients, suggesting it as a potential adjunct therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的随机对照试验（RCT）表明，一种动态腕手牵伸装置可有效改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能。对于康复从业者而言，这提示了一种可能比传统牵伸更易于患者居家依从的辅助干预手段，值得进一步大型研究验证。
items.titleZh: 使用动态腕手牵伸设备改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：初步随机对照试验
items.titleEn: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机对照试验显示，一种动态腕手牵伸设备可改善慢性卒中患者的屈肌痉挛，并可能改善手部功能，有望成为一种辅助治疗手段。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device can effectively improve flexor spasticity and potentially hand function in patients with chronic stroke. This points towards a potential adjunct intervention that may improve home adherence compared to conventional stretching, warranting further investigation in larger trials.
items.limitation: This is a pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limiting the generalizability of its findings and the ability to draw definitive conclusions about long-term efficacy.
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limiting the generalizability of its findings and the ability to draw definitive conclusions about long-term efficacy.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A meta-analysis found repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) to be effective for improving motor function in Parkinson's disease patients, short-term and long-term, with factors like stimulation site and frequency influencing outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病（PD）患者运动功能的影响，并探讨了影响治疗效果的因素。结果显示 rTMS 短期和长期均能改善运动功能，同时提示了优化治疗参数（如刺激位点、频率等）的重要性。对于神经康复从业者，这是基于证据的治疗选择，可考虑作为 PD 患者运动功能改善的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病患者运动功能的疗效及调节因素：荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃分析表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）可短期和长期改善帕金森病（PD）患者的运动功能，且刺激位点、频率等因素会影响治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis evaluates the effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease (PD) patients and explores influencing factors. It indicates that rTMS can improve motor function both short-term and long-term, highlighting the importance of optimizing treatment parameters. This provides an evidence-based therapeutic option for neurorehabilitation professionals to consider as an adjunct for improving motor function in PD patients.
items.limitation: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.
items.limitationEn: The included studies varied in stimulation site, coil type, frequency, and treatment duration, leading to heterogeneity that may affect the pooled results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified the need for weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries due to high recurrence rates and analyzed the methodological quality of existing literature, highlighting a need for higher-quality research.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并对现有研究的方法学质量进行了分析。鉴于腘绳肌损伤的高复发率，明确的重返运动标准对于减少复发、降低经济成本至关重要。该研究为制定更严谨的评估和决策流程提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 制定腘绳肌损伤重返运动的加权标准：系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.titleEn: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在为腘绳肌损伤的重返运动制定加权标准，并分析了现有研究的方法学质量，强调了提高研究质量以制定可靠标准的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review aims to establish weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injuries and analyzes the methodological quality of existing research. Given the high recurrence rate of hamstring injuries, clear return-to-play criteria are crucial for reducing relapses and economic costs. This study provides a reference for developing more rigorous assessment and decision-making processes.
items.limitation: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.
items.limitationEn: The review identified significant heterogeneity in the methodological quality of included studies, suggesting a need for higher-quality research to establish robust return-to-play criteria.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study found that a 12-week exergaming intervention improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 这项实用性准实验研究评估了 12 周的“电子游戏”（exergaming）干预对机构化老年衰弱症患者的身体、心理和社会结局的影响。研究假设游戏化干预能带来多方面的改善。对于老年康复从业者，这提供了关于如何利用游戏化技术改善机构化老年人生活质量的实用见解。
items.titleZh: 电子游戏对机构化衰弱老年人多方面益处：身体、心理与社会结局
items.titleEn: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验研究发现，为期 12 周的电子游戏（exergaming）干预改善了机构化衰弱老年人的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study evaluated the impact of a 12-week exergaming intervention on physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. The study hypothesized multifaceted improvements from gamified interventions. For geriatric rehabilitation professionals, this offers practical insights into leveraging exergaming to enhance the quality of life for institutionalized elderly.
items.limitation: The study involved a specific exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) and may not be generalizable to all exergaming platforms or populations.
items.limitationEn: The study involved a specific exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) and may not be generalizable to all exergaming platforms or populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of RCTs found that combined exercise training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响。结果显示，联合训练（结合有氧和抗阻训练）在降低 24 小时收缩压和舒张压方面最有效。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在高血压管理中推荐联合运动方案。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响：随机对照试验网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析发现，联合运动训练（有氧和抗阻）在高血压成人中对降低 24 小时动态血压最有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis of RCTs compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. The findings indicate that combined training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour systolic and diastolic blood pressure. This provides strong evidence for PTs to recommend combined exercise programs in hypertension management.
items.limitation: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.
items.limitationEn: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study examined the associations of functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with physical activity levels in 85 women with obesity.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了肥胖女性中，功能容量、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与整体体力活动水平的关联。虽然不能确定因果关系，但研究结果提示，在设计干预措施时，应同时考虑这几个因素，以提高女性的体力活动参与度。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝盖症状与功能容量
items.titleEn: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究，考察了功能容量、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与整体体力活动水平之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the associations between functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with overall physical activity levels in women with obesity. While causality cannot be determined, the findings suggest that interventions aiming to increase physical activity should simultaneously address these factors.
items.limitation: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between the assessed factors and physical activity levels in women with obesity.
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality between the assessed factors and physical activity levels in women with obesity.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis of UK Biobank data suggests that light-intensity physical activity (LPA) is associated with a reduced risk of all-cause mortality, even at low levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析，探讨了轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险之间在不同中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平下的剂量-反应关系。结果提示，即使在低 MVPA 水平下，增加 LPA 也能带来显著的死亡率降低。这为 PT 强调低强度活动（如日常活动、散步）的健康益处提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 轻度体力活动与全因死亡风险之间的剂量-反应关系：因果推断分析
items.titleEn: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析表明，轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险降低相关，即使在中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平较低时也是如此。
items.curatedReasonEn: This causal inference analysis using UK Biobank data explores the dose-response relationship between light-intensity physical activity (LPA) and all-cause mortality risk across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA). It suggests that increasing LPA can significantly reduce mortality risk, even at lower MVPA levels. This provides strong evidence for PTs to emphasize the health benefits of low-intensity activities.
items.limitation: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: An RCT found that perioperative respiratory muscle training improved respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）评估了围手术期呼吸肌训练对接受心脏手术的老年患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。结果表明，这种训练可能改善患者的肺部恢复和整体预后。对于进行心肺康复的 PT 来说，这是一项重要的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.titleEn: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）发现，围手术期呼吸肌训练可改善老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly cardiac surgery patients. Findings suggest this training may improve pulmonary recovery and overall prognosis. This provides important clinical evidence for PTs involved in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article offers strategies for managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation, emphasizing client-centered communication to foster the client-clinician relationship.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章提供了在康复环境中管理困难对话的策略，强调了以客户为中心的沟通方法。对于 PT 来说，学习和应用这些沟通技巧至关重要，尤其是在处理复杂情况和维护患者-治疗师关系时。
items.titleZh: 促进康复中的以客户为中心的沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.titleEn: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章提供了在康复环境中管理困难对话的策略，强调了以客户为中心的沟通方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article provides strategies for managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation settings, emphasizing client-centered communication approaches. For PTs, learning and applying these communication skills is crucial, especially when navigating complex situations and maintaining the client-therapist relationship.
items.limitation: This is a perspective or guide on communication strategies, not a research study presenting empirical data or evidence of effectiveness.
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective or guide on communication strategies, not a research study presenting empirical data or evidence of effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A small retrospective cohort study suggests that an intensive community-based virtual reality (VR) therapy may be effective in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究探讨了一种社区为基础的高强度、高剂量（HDHI）虚拟现实（VR）疗法（NG-NAT）在卒中后上肢损伤减少方面的效果。研究结果表明，这种疗法可能是一种可行的、有效的社区康复选择。对于卒中康复的 PT，这提供了关于利用 VR 技术在社区环境中改善上肢功能的新见解。
items.titleZh: 针对卒中后上肢损伤的强化社区化下一代神经动画疗法的疗效：一项小型回顾性队列研究
items.titleEn: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summaryZh: 一项小型回顾性队列研究表明，一种强化社区化虚拟现实（VR）疗法可能有效减少卒中后的上肢损伤。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study explored the effect of a community-based high-dose, high-intensity (HDHI) virtual reality (VR) therapy (NG-NAT) in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke. Findings suggest this therapy may be a viable and effective community-based rehabilitation option. For PTs involved in stroke rehabilitation, this offers new insights into leveraging VR technology for improving upper extremity function in community settings.
items.limitation: This is a small retrospective cohort study, limiting the ability to draw definitive conclusions about efficacy and generalizability. The lack of a control group makes it difficult to isolate the effect of the intervention.
items.limitationEn: This is a small retrospective cohort study, limiting the ability to draw definitive conclusions about efficacy and generalizability. The lack of a control group makes it difficult to isolate the effect of the intervention.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective piece emphasizes the importance of identifying and managing early symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) as a critical 'opportunity window' to slow disease progression, calling for increased clinical and research attention.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章强调了早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的识别和管理的重要性，指出这是减缓疾病进程的“机会窗口”。研究呼吁增加对这一领域的关注，并为临床医生和患者提供识别和有效治疗的指导。对于 PT 来说，这意味着在更年轻的患者群体中，需要更早地识别和干预髋关节 OA。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个机会窗口
items.titleEn: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summaryZh: 这篇观点文章强调了识别和管理早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的重要性，称其为减缓疾病进展的“机会窗口”，并呼吁增加对该领域的关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective highlights the importance of identifying and managing early symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA), labeling it an 'opportunity window' to slow disease progression. It calls for increased attention to this area and guidance for clinicians and patients on recognition and effective treatment. For PTs, this signifies the need for earlier identification and intervention for hip OA in younger patient populations.
items.limitation: This is a perspective piece, not a research study, and does not present new empirical data. Its clinical recommendations are based on current understanding and expert opinion.
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece, not a research study, and does not present new empirical data. Its clinical recommendations are based on current understanding and expert opinion.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
